feature: Bot Conversation Intelligence — Guided Prompts + Intent Disambiguation
requirement: Improve bot conversation capability. When user says 'create new instrument' without parameters, bot should ask for the required fields instead of listing instruments. Add guided prompts for all CRUD operations and intent disambiguation for ambiguous commands.

tasks.title: Guided prompts — ask for missing fields on incomplete CRUD commands
Go tests — guided prompt and disambiguation tests
tasks.description:
Write Go tests verifying the guided prompt behavior.

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor_test.go` — add tests:

1. 'create new instrument' → response contains 'provide' and example command (NOT instrument list)
2. 'create instrument' → same guided prompt
3. 'new instrument' → same guided prompt
4. 'create commodity' (no params) → asks for id/category/unit
5. 'add fee' → shows fee management options
6. 'create ticket' → shows ticket creation format
7. 'new receipt' → shows receipt format
8. 'create facility' → shows facility format
9. 'instrument' (just noun) → asks what to do
10. 'show instruments' → lists instruments (NOT guided prompt)
11. 'list commodities' → lists commodities (NOT guided prompt)
12. 'create commodity rice grain kg' → creates (NOT guided prompt)
13. 'create instrument RIC-2027 rice jul 2027 contract 5000 tick 0.01' → creates (NOT guided prompt)
14. 'margin' (just noun) → asks what to do with margin
15. 'help' → still shows full help

15+ tests. Use httptest.NewServer mock.

Acceptance: All tests pass. Guided prompts fire correctly. Existing behavior preserved.

tasks.title: Playwright UAT — bot guided conversation tests
tasks.description:
Write Playwright tests verifying the bot guides users through CRUD operations.

Update `tests/playwright/uat/bot-crud.spec.ts` — add tests:

1. 'create new instrument' → bot responds with format instructions (not instrument list)
2. 'create commodity' → bot asks for parameters
3. 'add fee' → bot shows fee management options
4. 'new receipt' → bot shows receipt format
5. User follows guided prompt → successful creation

Or create separate `tests/playwright/uat/bot-guided.spec.ts` with 8+ tests.

Acceptance: Bot guides users correctly. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Docker rebuild + UAT verify guided prompts
tasks.description:
Rebuild gateway, deploy, and verify guided prompts work in live system.

1. `cd src/gateway && go build ./... && go test ./internal/bot/`
2. `docker compose build gateway && docker restart garudax-gateway`
3. Re-register admin
4. Test: POST /bot/chat 'create new instrument' → verify guided prompt
5. Test: POST /bot/chat 'show instruments' → verify list (not prompt)
6. Run UAT: `cd tests/playwright && npx playwright test uat/bot-crud.spec.ts uat/bot-agent.spec.ts --project=uat`

Acceptance: All UAT tests pass. Guided prompts work in live browser.
